title: Coaching
subtitle: Coaching is structured inquiry — not mentoring, not therapy, not advice. A coach holds space for you to locate your own next step. Matching here uses style and format only; domain expertise belongs in mentoring.
distinction: Your coach won't tell you what to do — they'll help you find what you already know. No advice; topic or domain expertise is for mentoring, not coaching.

overview.styleDescription: If you hold people in inquiry — Socratic, somatic, challenge-based, or otherwise — offer it here.
overview.browseDescription: Find coaches by style and format only. If you need subject-matter expertise, use mentoring.
overview.engagementsDescription: View active and past coaching engagements. Write your arc reflection when complete.
overview.myRequestsDescription: View and withdraw your pending coaching requests.
overview.incomingRequestsDescription: Browse open coaching requests and accept them as a coach.

howItWorksItems.matching: Matching is based on style compatibility and format only; domain expertise belongs in mentoring
howItWorksItems.accept: Coaches accept requests; the engagement is then active
howItWorksItems.noRatings: No ratings. The coachee writes a reflection; the coach may add an observation (not an assessment)
howItWorksItems.availability: Coaches in RESTING or REFLECTING availability are not shown in browse

find.title: Find a Coach
find.subtitle: Explore coaches who are available for new engagements.
find.empty: No coaching offers match your filters.
find.noOffers: No coaching offers available right now. Check back soon.

offer.coacheeKnow: What a coachee should know before we start
offer.coacheeKnowPlaceholder: What should the coachee know before requesting?
offer.pageDescription: Describe your coaching style, format, and availability.

myOffers.title: My Coaching Offers
myOffers.empty: You have not created any coaching offers yet.

request.shiftsWanted: What shifts would make a difference?
request.pageDescription: Share where you are stuck and what shifts you are hoping for.

myRequests.title: My Coaching Requests
myRequests.subtitle: Your pending coaching requests. Withdraw a request if it is no longer needed.
myRequests.empty: You have no pending coaching requests.

requests.incomingSubtitle: Open requests from changemakers seeking coaching. Accept a request to start an engagement.
requests.incomingEmpty: No open coaching requests right now.

connections.title: My Coaching Connections
connections.subtitle: Track your coaching engagements across all stages.

coachee.title: Reflect on this coaching engagement
coachee.prompt: What did you come in stuck on? What shifted? What did this engagement make possible?

coach.title: Optional: what did the coachee bring to the work?
coach.prompt: An observation about the quality of the engagement — not an assessment of the coachee's progress.

feedback.publicNote: This reflection will be visible on the engagement record.

feedbackForm.yourReflectionHint: What shifted? What did this engagement make possible?
feedbackForm.yourReflectionPlaceholder: Share your honest reflection on this engagement…
feedbackForm.coachObservationHint: An observation about the quality of the engagement — not an assessment.
feedbackForm.coachObservationPlaceholder: Optional observation about the coachee's engagement…

requestForm.shiftsWantedLabel: What shifts would make a difference?
requestForm.shiftsWantedPlaceholder: What would a meaningful shift look like?
requestForm.formatPreferencePlaceholder: e.g. video call, async email, in-person
